Package.Name: Licensing
Package.Summary: Evaluate license claims against time, runtime, module, machine, and pre-shared-key requirements.

Generation.Title: Generated transferable license
Generation.Intro: This signed envelope and public key are generated through the package API. The ephemeral private key is never displayed or returned.
Generation.ImportHint: An application can use the signed text as LicenseText and register the public key under this key ID before LicenseReader or LicenseService validates it.
Generation.Error: The license could not be generated:

Fields.ModulesHelp: Separate module identifiers with commas or new lines.
Fields.LicensePsk: Pre-shared key stored by the issuer

Result.Title: Validation result
Result.Empty: Validate the current claims to inspect the stable result code and diagnostic.

Tips.Title: What to notice
Tips.Claims: LicenseValidator evaluates already verified claims. Signature verification belongs to LicenseReader before this step.
Tips.Modules: Module checks are case-insensitive and may be bypassed explicitly with AllModules.
Tips.Machines: Machine restrictions use privacy-preserving 64-character SHA-256 fingerprints.
Tips.Psk: The license stores a license-scoped digest, not the pre-shared key itself.
Tips.ExpectedFailures: Expired, missing-module, machine, runtime, and key mismatches are normal validation results rather than host exceptions.

Purpose.Title: Purpose
Purpose.Body: Pocok.Licensing provides offline license documents, signature verification, claim validation, and runtime enforcement for .NET applications.

QuickStart.Title: Quick start
QuickStart.Body: Choose an example, edit the claims and runtime facts, then generate a signed transferable license or run LicenseValidator. The public sandbox keeps every value in memory.

Claims.Title: Supported claims
Claims.Body: Claims cover validity windows, maximum process runtime, modules, machine fingerprints, a license-scoped pre-shared-key digest, and non-secret metadata.

Signatures.Title: Signature boundary
Signatures.Body: Applications receive public keys and verify signed ECDSA P-256 envelopes with LicenseReader. Private signing keys must remain outside client deployments.

Runtime.Title: Runtime enforcement
Runtime.Body: LicenseValidator returns stable result codes. LicenseService caches the latest refresh and LicenseGuard converts failed checks into operation-level exceptions when required.

Production.Title: Production notes
Production.Body: Licensing is an offline deterrent, not an unbreakable DRM boundary. Keep valuable checks close to protected work and exclude secrets from logs and diagnostics.

Boundaries.Title: Sandbox boundaries
Boundaries.ClaimsOnly: Builds, signs, verifies, and validates in-memory claims through the public API.
Boundaries.NoPrivateKeys: Ephemeral private signing keys remain in memory and are never displayed or returned.
Boundaries.NoFiles: Does not read or write license files on the server.
Boundaries.ExpectedFailures: Validation failures remain structured results and do not stop the host.

Source.Title: Source documentation
Source.Body: Package documentation for signing, encryption, claim semantics, runtime services, and the threat model.

valid-module.Name: Licensed module
valid-module.Description: Validate a current license that includes the requested Reporting module.

missing-module.Name: Missing module
missing-module.Description: Request Admin from a license that only includes Reporting and Export.

expired.Name: Expired license
expired.Description: Move the current time to the exclusive end of the license window.

runtime-exceeded.Name: Runtime exceeded
runtime-exceeded.Description: Exceed the license's maximum process runtime by one minute.

machine-mismatch.Name: Machine mismatch
machine-mismatch.Description: Validate a license bound to a different machine fingerprint.

psk-mismatch.Name: Wrong pre-shared key
psk-mismatch.Description: Supply a key that does not match the license-scoped digest.
